title: platylobium formosum var. typicum
intro: Platylobium formosum var. typicum is a plant species in the family Fabaceae, commonly known as the flat-pea or native pea. It is native to eastern Australia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The plant has been used in traditional medicine to treat various health conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, due to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and improving immune function. The leaves and stems of the plant can be prepared as infusions or teas, or as a tincture, allowing for various herbal preparations to be made for medicinal use.
